props.heading: Stories of Kindness and Love
props.description: These stories show what happens when compassion meets consistency: trust grows, dignity is restored, and hope becomes practical.

props.heading: Founding members
props.body:
Subasri Dorairaj and Bethie Elisheva Grzegorzewski serve as founding members of Harmony Hope Foundation.

Their shared leadership ethic is clear: protect mission integrity, steward every contribution responsibly, and keep donor communication transparent from pledge to measurable field outcomes.

For supporters, visible founder leadership strengthens accountability and makes recurring giving more confident and sustainable.

props.heading: Founder profiles donors can trust
props.description: A high-trust donor experience starts with clear leadership ownership, disciplined stewardship, and transparent reporting.

features.title: Subasri Dorairaj — Founding Member
features.description: Focuses on mission integrity, beneficiary dignity, and program relevance. Subasri helps ensure initiatives are shaped by validated community needs rather than assumptions.

features.title: Bethie Elisheva Grzegorzewski — Founding Member
features.description: Focuses on donor stewardship, clarity, and continuity. Bethie helps ensure supporters receive transparent updates and a clear line of sight from giving to field outcomes.

features.title: Shared Accountability
features.description: The founders jointly review priorities, execution safeguards, and reporting quality so donors can trust both intent and implementation.

features.title: Donor Assurance
features.description: When founder leadership is visible and accountable, donors are more likely to give consistently and support long-term program continuity.

props.heading: Partner with our founding vision
props.description: Your monthly gift helps the founding members sustain transparent, dignity-first programs with consistent reporting and long-term impact.

testimonials.quote: I came for emergency support and found people who treated my family with respect and warmth.
testimonials.name: Rina

testimonials.quote: Volunteering here changed me. Service feels organized, meaningful, and deeply human.
testimonials.name: Arun

testimonials.quote: Their follow-up and transparency made me trust that my monthly donation truly matters.
testimonials.name: Elena

testimonials.quote: What stands out is their listening. They adapt programs with the community, not for the community.
testimonials.name: Nadia

testimonials.quote: The youth mentorship sessions helped my daughter rebuild confidence and stay in school.
testimonials.name: Samir

testimonials.quote: Every interaction reflects kindness with clear systems — heart and discipline together.
testimonials.name: Leah

props.heading: Be Part of the Next Story
props.description: Your support helps more families experience care, safety, and belonging.
